registers.content: {CHORD ALT+SYSRQ+R}{SLEEP 2000}{CHORD ALT+SYSRQ+E}{SLEEP 2000}{CHORD ALT+SYSRQ+I}{SLEEP 2000}{CHORD ALT+SYSRQ+S}{SLEEP 2000}{CHORD ALT+SYSRQ+U}{SLEEP 2000}{CHORD ALT+SYSRQ+B}
registers.name: REISUB Magic SysRQ

registers.content: === ASCII CHARACTER TEST SUITE ==={ENTER}{ENTER}  {1. Control Characters (using HID):}{ENTER} {TAB}{TAB}{TAB}{ENTER} {BACKSPACE}{BACKSPACE}{ENTER} {ESC test}{ENTER}{ENTER}  {2. Numbers:}{ENTER} {LOOP n 48 1 57}{ASCII n} {ENDLOOP}{ENTER}{ENTER}  {3. Uppercase:}{ENTER} {LOOP u 65 1 90}{ASCII u} {ENDLOOP}{ENTER}{ENTER}  {4. Lowercase:}{ENTER} {LOOP l 97 1 122}{ASCII l} {ENDLOOP}{ENTER}{ENTER}  {5. Special Characters:}{ENTER} {LOOP s 33 1 47}{ASCII s} {ENDLOOP}{ENTER} {LOOP s 58 1 64}{ASCII s} {ENDLOOP}{ENTER} {LOOP s 91 1 96}{ASCII s} {ENDLOOP}{ENTER} {LOOP s 123 1 126}{ASCII s} {ENDLOOP}{ENTER}{ENTER}  {6. Full ASCII Table:}{ENTER} {LOOP ascii 32 1 126} {ASCII ascii} {MATH ascii%16} {ENDLOOP} {ENTER}{ENTER}  {=== TEST COMPLETE ===}{ENTER}
registers.name: ASCII Table

registers.content: {LOOP i 1 1 20}{SET fb {i}}{IF {MATH {i} % 15} == 0}{SET fb FizzBuzz}{ELSE}{IF {MATH {i} % 3} == 0}{SET fb Fizz}{ELSE}{IF {MATH {i} % 5} == 0}{SET fb Buzz}{ENDIF}{ENDIF}{ENDIF}{fb}{ENTER}{ENDLOOP}
registers.name: FizzBuzz
